title: Why there will be military helicopters in Edinburgh on Tuesday

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: POLICE have warned the public not to be alarmed if they hear gunshots and see armed police or military helicopters in Edinburgh on Tuesday

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Why there will be military helicopters in Edinburgh on Tuesday Police and military will be seen at Murrayfield stadium on March 3 due to a training exercise (Image: Jane Barlow/PA)

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: This article is brought to you by our exclusive subscriber partnership with our sister title USA Today, and has been written by our American colleagues. It does not necessarily reflect the view of The Herald. POLICE have warned the public not to be alarmed if they hear gunshots and see armed police or military helicopters in Edinburgh on Tuesday.
